description_long: This bird has a slender, elongated body with a pointed, slightly downcurved beak and a distinctive black crescent on its upper chest. Its plumage is primarily light brown to tan, heavily marked with black spots on the breast and flanks, and a black bar across the nape. The wings and tail feature striking yellow highlights, especially visible on the underside and edges of the tail feathers. The head is smooth and rounded, with a subtle reddish patch near the cheek and a pale eye. The legs are short and appear grayish, and the overall feather pattern is a mix of spots and subtle barring, giving it a highly textured appearance.
description: A slender, spotted bird with a pointed beak, yellow tail highlights, and a black crescent on its chest. Its plumage is tan with black spots and subtle reddish and yellow accents.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the spotted tan back, yellow tail feathers, and the pointed beak.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black crescent on the chest, the reddish cheek patch, and the yellow under-tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pale eye, smooth head, and the yellow tail edge visible.
description_view_3: Rear oblique view emphasizing the spotted back, yellow tail, and the overall streamlined body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Spotted breast and flanks, black crescent on chest, barred wings, yellow highlights on tail and wings, reddish cheek patch.
